title: bidens chrysanthemoides var. nashii
intro: Bidens chrysanthemoides var. nashii, also known as Yellowhead or Swamp Marigold, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The medicinal properties of Bidens chrysanthemoides var. nashii are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, glycosides, and other bioactive compounds, which can provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties and provide a range of health benefits.
